title: b@hemowth #0930
definition:
1) perhaps an extinct dinosaur
    1a) a Diplodocus or Brachiosaurus, exact meaning unknown
 ++++
 Some translate as elephant or hippopotamus but from the
 description in \\#Job 40:15-24\\, this is patently absurd.
